title: Freshly Distant
description: Enhanced performance, visuals, and audio. A better basic layer for the vanilla game.
body:
# Freshly Distant
![Fabric Modloader](https://img.shields.io/badge/modloader-Fabric-blue?link=https%3A%2F%2Ffabricmc.net%2F) ![Environment Client](https://img.shields.io/badge/environment-client-blue)

Combine the latest optimizations from [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) with all required elements for compatibility with [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) and [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons), plus additional features. The focus is on improving the visual and audio experience. This includes the [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) shaders, properly configured by default. Additionally, the resource packs are correctly ordered from the start.

This modpack is the result of enthusiasm and countless hours spent engaging with developer communities on Discord and incorporating ideas from YouTube channels such as [AsianHalfSquat](https://www.youtube.com/@AsianHalfSquat) and [EnderVerse](https://www.youtube.com/@EnderVerseMC). 

It also serves as a comparison tool for different Minecraft versions and the mods available for each one. The modpack is client-sided. Some of the mods are designed for server-side use but are included for single-player worlds. Check out the following recommended modpack for server-side optimization: [Adrenaserver](https://modrinth.com/modpack/adrenaserver) (not sponsored, just a good modpack for servers).

Table comparing all the content:
[Content Table](https://github.com/Eianex/Freshly-Distant/blob/main/README.md)

[![Modpack Combination](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc6f1780b4d1da480305db81b57e82607f99e738.png)](https://github.com/Eianex/Freshly-Distant/blob/main/README.md)
